extra.reason: Created notebooks/04_structural_analysis.py with H1-H4 statistical tests. H2 supported, H1 significant but reversed, H3/H4 undermined by ceiling effects. Results-log.md updated.

Exploratory AI adoption analysis added to notebooks/04_structural_analysis.py. Only C:V ratio significantly differentiates tool_user vs integrated (p=0.001, delta=-0.107). Results-log.md updated with cross-target comparison.
Created .claude/context/phase1-postmortem.md with extraction retrospective. Updated results-log.md with H1-H4 results, AI adoption analysis, and Phase 4 synthesis section.
All Phase 4 tasks complete: H1-H4 confirmatory analysis, AI adoption exploratory analysis, Phase 1 post-mortem, Phase 4 synthesis.
Protocol frozen at docs/method-review/00-evaluation-protocol.md (commit 3946c6b). All 8 decisions pinned; FROZEN banner dated 2026-06-10; no deferred decisions.
repeated_run.py implemented: 900-run sweep complete, summary.json written, results documented
summary.json + results-log.md Phase 1 section with selected configs, paired deltas, chance baseline, explicit per-target verdict
structure_only feature_mode added to GraphDataset/graph_gnn_encoder; trained + encoded to cache/*_structure_only.*; canonical caches untouched
label_bag_encoder.py created; cache/label_bag_embeddings.npy [1250,384] + ids written; pytest covers determinism + empty-graph zero vector

masked node-type objective implemented (--objective masked); held-out masked acc=0.9783 (90/10 split, seed=0); cache/gin_*_masked.* written for all 1250 graphs; default node_type path/caches unchanged

ablation_probe.py + ablation_run.py implemented; results/method_review/phase2/summary.json written; results-log.md Phase 2 section states kill-criterion verdict (criterion not met as literally stated; full_gin significantly underperforms label_bag on both targets, structure_only beats chance on both)
All 8 child beads complete (P1.1-P1.4, P2.1-P2.4). Method-Review Phases 1-2 done.

v4 infra + amendment + A/B pilot complete: namespaced out-dir (v3 intact), grounding/C10 landed, deepseek-think chosen over deepseek-chat (chat schema-fills uniform 1+1 SUBSUMES/IMPLIES; think is faithful, 0 viol, variable). Committed f8d5648.

1250/1250 v4_think graphs extracted (s1_data/graphs/v4_think/free_text), 0 failures remaining (all 8 transient API failures succeeded on retry after the concurrency=3 + empty-content-retry fix). Final checkpoint: 0.6% violation rate (7/1250 graphs, 35 total - mostly from a single recurring MODULATED_BY-direction pattern, tracked as graph-modality-70b), schema-filling stabilized at 16.7% (peaked 19.6%, never approached 100% abort threshold), grounding 100% correct (all SUBSUMES/IMPLIES inferred), size confound corr=0.084 (negligible). No abort criteria triggered.

Auto-correct implemented: fix_modulated_by_direction() flips CSM→Construct|Stance to Construct|Stance→CSM in validator.py, integrated into apply_canonical.py. 5 new tests. Verified all 19 violations across 3 graphs resolved.

GINEConv encoder implemented and trained. Changes: (1) graph_dataset.py: RELATIONS expanded to 6 types (SUBSUMES, IMPLIES added), edge_attr dim changed from 4→6. (2) graph_gnn_encoder.py: GINEEncoder + GINEAutoencoder classes added (GINEConv consumes edge_attr). Training: 47 epochs, best_loss=0.0003, final_acc=1.0000. Frozen embeddings: 1,250×128-dim cached at cache/gine_embeddings_v4_think.npy. Existing GINEncoder unchanged.

NULL-LADDER VERDICT: PASS. GINEConv(typed) reliably beats bag-of-types histogram baseline. Mean delta = +0.0287 macro-F1, 95% CI = [+0.0094, +0.0480], CI excludes 0, delta >= +0.01. 8/10 seeds positive. Typed relational structure carries classification signal beyond node/edge-type frequency distributions — the v4 edge-modality hypothesis is supported. Results recorded in cache/null_ladder/results.json and .claude/context/results-log.md.

EPIC COMPLETE. Null-ladder edge test verdict: PASS. Typed relational structure (GINEConv with edge-type embeddings) reliably beats bag-of-types histogram baseline under 10-seed CI protocol. Mean delta = +0.0287 macro-F1, 95% CI = [+0.0094, +0.0480] — CI excludes 0 and delta >= +0.01. The v4 edge-modality hypothesis is supported: edge-type-aware graph topology carries classification signal beyond node/edge-type frequency distributions. Verdict recorded in .claude/context/results-log.md. All 5 children closed.

VERDICT: FAIL. ai_adoption null-ladder does not pass: mean delta = +0.0028, 95% CI = [-0.0172, +0.0228] includes 0, mean delta << +0.01 threshold. 6/10 seeds positive. GINEConv(typed) does NOT reliably beat bag-of-types histogram on the primary (unconfounded) target. The cohort PASS from graph-modality-7sa is likely driven by interview-protocol confound. Per METHOD_REVIEW Phase 2.6 gate: Phase 3 extraction budget should NOT be committed — honest pivot is to fix the encoder objective first.

PASS on both targets. ai_adoption: mean F1=0.5389, chance=0.3367, mean delta=+0.2022, 95% CI=[+0.1753, +0.2290] (PASS). cohort: mean F1=0.3382, chance=0.2959, mean delta=+0.0423, 95% CI=[+0.0120, +0.0726] (PASS). v4 topology alone (5-dim type+degree GIN) clears chance with large margin on primary target. Confirms the topology hypothesis is alive under v4 ontology — the edge-type null-ladder FAIL on ai_adoption means typed edges specifically don't add signal over the histogram, but structure itself does.

EPIC COMPLETE. Phase 2.6 kill-criterion on primary target (ai_adoption): MIXED. (1) Null-ladder (GINEConv typed vs histogram): FAIL on ai_adoption — mean delta +0.0028, CI includes 0. Typed edges do NOT add signal over bag-of-types on the clean target. (2) structure_only > chance: PASS on both targets — topology alone (+0.20 ai_adoption, +0.04 cohort) clears chance with large margins. GATE FOR PHASE 3: The epic scope decided that FAIL on ai_adoption null-ladder blocks Phase 3 extraction budget. Honest pivot per METHOD_REVIEW: fix encoder objective before spending on multi-model replication. The topology hypothesis is alive (structure carries signal) but the edge-type encoding specifically doesn't help — a stronger self-supervised objective (contrastive, motif prediction) is the highest-leverage next step.
Kimi adjudicator implemented, tested, and run on all 277 disagreements; consensus finalized to cache/ambivalence.jsonl (1250 usable labels); quality gates pass
Agents and context docs updated for stance_ambivalence: spec moved to .claude/context/, extraction/encoding/analysis agents updated, extraction-log and ENGINEERING.md updated

Labels finalised by parallel session: cache/ambivalence.jsonl (1250 usable; med=843/low=352/high=55), Cohen's kappa=0.504, 277 disagreements Kimi-adjudicated. Documented in docs/adr/0005-ambivalence-target-adjudication.md + results-log.md + ENGINEERING §4.4. Reporting acceptance met.

stance_ambivalence wired into BOTH paths. Repeated path (the H_fusion protocol): fixed slice_modalities (was raising ValueError for the target while make_split already handled it) + added to repeated_run TARGETS. Sweep path: train_config Target/TARGET_CLASSES(=3)/build_sweep+build_sklearn_sweep targets; train_run argparse choices + best-by-target loop; build_dataset packages a stance_ambivalence .npz stratified by the ordinal label at seed=42 (test split: low=53/med=127/high=8). Verified: dry-run enumerates full matrix; build_dataset writes npz; one real sklearn run executes (text+graph macro-F1=0.417); 2 new tests; full suite 115 pass; ruff clean.

H_fusion ran (10-seed, balanced-weighted, stratified). VERDICT: FAIL on the strict best-single criterion. Fusion beats text (weakest arm) but NO fusion arm beats the strongest single modality, graph-stats (0.453): text+stats+graph=0.448 ~ stats, paired delta -0.005 CI[-0.032,+0.022]. Signal is NOT complementary — graph subsumes text (design-spec outcome #2). REAL FINDING: graph-stats(0.453) > text(0.367) by +0.086 CI[+0.047,+0.125] — strongest modality-distinctness evidence yet, exactly as the lexically-non-obvious target was designed to expose. Also: deterministic stats(0.453) > learned GIN(0.388), flagged for P6.4. Results in results-log.md Phase 6 section; raw in results/method_review/ambivalence/.

H_edge 2-D ablation ran. PRIMARY (edge-type) FAIL: on structure-only features (v4_think), typed GINEConv ~ untyped GINConv ~ histogram ~ chance (0.269); typed-untyped=-0.001 CI[-0.019,+0.018], untyped-histogram=-0.003. Edge presence AND type add nothing. KILL-CRITERION satisfied: label_bag (no edges, 0.399) BEATS full_gin (with edges, 0.326) by +0.072 CI[-0.094,-0.050] => learned graph signal is node-attribute/label semantics, not wiring (METHOD_REVIEW #4 vindicated). SYNTHESIS: signal is distributional node-attribute (stats 0.453, has stance valence), not relational. 'Structurally distinct modality' holds distributionally (stats>text), NOT topologically. Runners: s5_classification/h_edge.py + ablation_run.py --target. Results in results-log.md; raw in cache/h_edge/ + results/method_review/ambivalence_ablation/.

v4 re-canonicalisation + all Phase 6 tests re-run on v4. Built locked canonical_map_v4.json (5649 canonical from 21815, threshold 0.35); applied to v4_think/canonical (1250, 0 unmapped). Repointed stats/GIN/label_bag encoders to v4; fixed None-label crash (6 nodes). Recomputed all v4 caches; rebuilt .npz. VERDICT (v4, single corpus, supersedes v3 numbers): (1) modality-distinctness SUPPORTED stats 0.433 > text 0.367 +0.066 CI[+0.016,+0.116]; (2) complementarity NOT supported, text+stats - stats +0.020 CI spans 0; (3) edge/relational DEAD - edges add nothing, label_bag(no edges)0.402 > full_gin(edges)0.285, structure_only 0.265 at chance. v3 structure_only-beats-chance anomaly RESOLVED (at chance on v4). Results in results-log Phase6-v4 section; raw in results/method_review/ambivalence_v4 + ambivalence_ablation_v4. v3 canonical_map.json immutable.

NOT-APPLICABLE. Scoped to replicate the TOPOLOGY delta across extractors via the v4 null-ladder. Phase 6 (ADR-0006) found topology is dead on two corpora (H_edge: edges add nothing; structure_only at chance; label_bag without edges beats full_gin with edges). There is no topology delta to replicate, so the budget-capped multi-model extraction is not spent. Residual: the surviving distributional result (stats>text) still rests on DeepSeek-extracted graphs; a cross-extractor check of THAT specific result is the sensible future validation, but it is a new narrowly-scoped question (file a fresh <=30-transcript bead), not a reopen of this epic. See ADR-0006.

Synthesis complete. ADR-0006 (distributional-not-relational verdict) created; results-log Phase 6 + Phase 6-v4 sections hold both verdicts; CLAUDE.md Current Phase marks Phase 6 complete; go/no-go on 6k9 recorded (closed not-applicable).

Phase 6 complete. All 6 children + r3p closed. Verdict (ADR-0006, v4 corpus): modality-distinctness SUPPORTED (stats>text, CI excludes 0); complementarity NOT supported; relational/edge hypothesis REJECTED. Signal is distributional node-attribute, not topology.
